case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. KENNETH MORRIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 380 EDDY STREET #416, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL $8.13 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, KENNETH

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MORRIS, KENNETH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MORRIS, KENNETH
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, KENNETH
